handoff_focus: review issue coupling and determine whether bounded autonomous handling remains legitimate

escalation.rationale: Human review is required because the domain layer indicates complexity beyond a clean bounded autonomous path.

summary_state.next_step: Use the next step to bring in a human reviewer, preserve the current process concerns clearly, and decide whether bounded autonomous handling can still continue.

active_flags.title: Domain complexity is exceeding the bounded autonomous path
active_flags.note: Issue coupling or process interdependence may require live human review.

recent_turn_summaries.message_summary: Parent B says they are willing to keep working, but without school calendar details, therapy availability, transport ownership, and reimbursement expectations clarified together, any apparent option would be misleading.
Name the participation pattern neutrally, normalize that both voices are needed, and offer Party B structured private space to surface their own priorities before continuing joint session.

Parent A and parent b both accept that a human review is the better next step before the session tries to lock in any package around the coupled school, therapy, transport, and reimbursement questions.

case_title: Interdependent school, therapy, transport, and reimbursement bundle exceeds bounded autonomy
